getInfo.description: Return server version and capabilities. Use when the user asks about server info, version, or health status.

getNamespaces.description: List all namespaces available on the server. Use when the user asks about namespaces or wants to explore the data model.

getObjectTypes.description: Return all object types. Use when the user asks about types, schemas, or structure of objects.

queryObjectTypesById.description: Return object type schemas for specific element IDs. Use when the user asks for type details of specific objects.

getRelationshipTypes.description: Return all relationship types. Use when the user asks about relationships or how objects are connected.

queryRelationshipTypesById.description: Return relationship types for specific element IDs. Use when the user asks about relationships of specific objects.

getObjects.description: Return objects, optionally filtered by type or root. Use when the user asks to browse or list objects.

listObjectsById.description: Return objects by element ID. Use when the user asks for specific objects by ID.

queryRelatedObjects.description: Return related objects for one or more element IDs. Use when the user asks about connections or related items.

queryLastKnownValues.description: Return last known values for objects. Use when the user asks for current or latest values.

queryHistoricalValues.description: Return historical values for objects. Use when the user asks for trends, history, or past values.

getHistoricalValues.description: Return historical values for a single object, optionally filtered by time range. Use when the user asks for history of one object.

updateObjectHistory.description: Update historical values for an object. Use when the user explicitly asks to modify historical data.

updateObjectValue.description: Update the current value of an object. Use when the user asks to write or update a value.

createSubscription.description: Create a new subscription for monitoring values. Use when the user asks to subscribe to updates.

registerMonitoredItems.description: Add monitored items to a subscription. Use when the user wants to monitor additional objects.

removeMonitoredItems.description: Remove monitored items from a subscription. Use when the user wants to stop monitoring objects.

streamSubscription.description: Open a streaming SSE connection for subscription updates. Use when the user asks for live or streaming updates.

syncSubscription.description: Synchronize subscription updates and acknowledge received data. Use when the user asks to sync or fetch pending updates.

deleteSubscriptions.description: Delete one or more subscriptions. Use when the user asks to remove or delete subscriptions.

listSubscriptions.description: Return details for one or more subscriptions. Use when the user asks about subscription status or configuration.
